feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: It's possible to connect SAP HANA CLOUD TRIAL with PowerBi?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know, if is possible to connect SAP HANA CLOUD TRIAL with PowerBi?
Because I am getting this error, and I don't know what to do.
Failed to save modifications to the server. Error returned: 'Erro do OLE DB ou do ODBC : [DataSource.Error] ODBC: ERROR [S1000] [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '8B6E9BCE5E89814EAF1980EA3B9E59EB'. '.

I'm trying to get the data from a container in Hana, because I have an application in SAP BAS with the SAP Hana

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachments - data not updated in hana cloud db
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on attachments in sap cap. I am following the below tutorial

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/my-journey-towards-using-ui5-uploadset-with-cap-backend/ba-p/13499427

As per the tutorial, i can able to post and get the attachments. 

when i test i can able to see the data locally as shown below. but i want to see the data in hana cloud db.

Seeing data locally

Connect to local sqlite db

Why this is connecting to sqlite db by default even i have hana cloud db.

Do we need to specify the hana db here?

Please help.

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Accessing workcenter api gives error - A_WorkCentersType
entry.content:
Accessing below workcenter api gives error
Resource not found - A_WorkCentersType

The call works in SAP gateway client though and returns workcenters. 

/sap/API_WORK_CENTERS/A_WorkCenters?$select=WorkCenterDesc,WorkCenter,WorkCenterInternalID,WorkCente

The type A_WorkCenters returns collection A_WorkCentersType.

A_WorkCentersType is present in the edmx file but not in generated csn file. 

Could that be issue ? Do we need to manually change the csn file to add entity A_WorkCentersType and how ?

 

 

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_WORK_CENTERS_0001/overview

entry.title: Connect SAP BAS to SAP Public Cloud Problem
entry.content:
I try to connect BAS to Public Cloud follow step tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-custom-ui-bas-connect-s4hc.html

The difference is my domain is xxx.sap.cloud and in tutorial is ondemand.com . But when I check Destination Connection in BAS, I got error  Unauthorized to access v4 catalog service, Unauthorized to access v2 catalog service. How can I fix it?
Update: This is error when I check connection in BAS

Thanks very much,

entry.title: How to use Plan property of ui5 SaaS applications?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I created SaaS UI5 application with two plans and consumers can subscribe one of them. It looks very nice. But now I would like to know how I can try out my application in different modes or variations depend on choosen plan

For example, application has Free and Standard plan. Is it possible to separate the funtionality of application on controler level?

Part of my config SaaS service in mta.yaml looks like

appPlans:
  - name: Free
    description: Free plan
  - name: Standard
    description: Standard plan

Thx.

entry.title: BTP destination not appearing in BAS storyboard
entry.content:
I am following this course: Develop Full-Stack Applications Using Productivity Tools in SAP Business Application Studio  and have encountered a problem. The course material is a bit out date with the referenced Cloud systems (also the internal walkthrough playbacks don't match the course screens) , but I have been able to follow it up until the point that it uses live data.

In Course Unit 2, from BAS I have logged into the accelerator hub and obtained service details, which have correctly transferred into a service definition.   

In another section following this, I have to create a destination in BTP cockpit to the same hub.

The connection check gives

I'm not sure if 404 is the correct response but it suggests the server is at least responding. I can also get a feed response from the Hub API "Try Out" feature of the Business Partner API that the service is modelled on, so it would appear that a correctly formed API request would work.

I have a problem with the built Fiori Elements application. The lesson starts off using sample data, which works. I am then prompted to build a 'live data' configuration and this is where things fail. The screen below shows the 'apihub_sandbox' destination being populated in the course article, but in my case it is empty, no default, do dropdown.

It is not explained how this destination is supposed to recognised in BAS or if there is a step missing. I have been back and forth and cannot find any missing steps. I have looked at notes on the property WebIDEUsage and it doesn't list it being used in this way, i.e. I don't know if 'apihub_sandbox' is a new standard value that has a certain use or if it is just an identifying tag value. 

I have the required administrator role in BAS. I have triple-checked the destination properties, but it just doesn't work. 

Can anyone provide any guidance?

entry.title: CICD - Configure an SAP Fiori for the onpremise ABAP Platform
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new and trying to build the pipeline using CICD services for Freestyle Fiori projects. i have to deploy the app to the on premise ABAP platform using CICD. Currently the infrastructure works fine for manual deployment.

Currently i have created the job in CICD and able to complete the prerequisite steps like job creation, credentials mapping, web hook. init and build stage is successful.  i need your help for setting up release stage

Configure the stages of your SAP Fiori for the ABAP platform job directly in the SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery service.

In the release stage - Upload Credentials - is the gateway server credentials to be given?

 Configure the stages of your SAP Fiori for the ABAP platform job in your repository.

  1. In the Git repository in which your project sources reside, create a new file named .pipeline/config.yml.
  2. Copy the following content into your config.yml file:
     

these steps do anyone has the sample file with all the configuration steps written 

 

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: odata services are not loaded when the app is ran locally from BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 Odata metadata are not loaded while running app locally on BAS also in BTP launchpad (cloud foundry). which was working fine previously. Is it because of any version updates or do I need to update version? 

The same set of Odata Service metadata are loaded in onPremise system as expected.

entry.title: How can I connect my HDI Container of my SAP Hana Cloud with my SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need help with this problem. I need to extract some data from an HDI Container in my Hana Cloud to use in my PowerBi. However, I cannot access the data because it says I don't have permission. I have already tried to use the SAP Data Datasphere trial. So, here is my question: how can I connect my HDI Container in my SAP Hana Cloud with SAP Data Intelligence? All my accounts are free, so is there some problem? I created this HDI Container with the SAP BAS.

entry.title: getting error while deploying the SAP CAPM service in cf env. "Some instance has crashed"
entry.content:
Hi folks,

While consuming external API service in our SAP CAP project we are getting error in deployment that "Some instance has crashed". It is showing in logs the below error, but this error is not able to conclude the exact reason. Please help if anyone has clue about this issue. 

instance: cf289ff5-ff7e-4428-6bc1-d71c, index: 0, cell_id: 38614a92-7668-48b9-b60e-50fda881d051, exit_description: APP/PROC/WEB: Exited with status 1, reason: CRASHED

just to inform that we have enough space in disk to run and deploy the application and use at least one auth in package.json. And currently we have updated the node.js version to 20.0.0,but the issue still persists. 

Any clue about the issue will be great help to us. Thanks !

entry.title: Custom chart is not displaying data in SAP UI Integration chart
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to SAP build work zone advanced edition and UI integration card. I created UI integration card to displays data from the SAP gateway system, so I created destination and consumed that destination in manifest.json and define content as well. But when I preview UI integration card in BAS, it is not showing any data and I don't see any errors in the network tab. Below is the manifest.json code. Kindly help me if I missing anything.

{
    "_version": "1.14.0",
    "sap.app": {
        "id": "ns.uicard",
        "type": "card",
        "title": "Workflow History UI card",
        "subTitle": "",
        "applicationVersion": {
            "version": "1.0.0"
        }
    },
    "sap.ui": {
        "technology": "UI5",
        "deviceTypes": {"desktop": true, "phone": true, "tablet": true},
        "icons": {
            "icon": "sap-icon://list"
        }
    },
    "sap.card": {
        "type": "List",
         "configuration":{
                   "destinations":{
                      "FD1":{
                         "name": "Workflow_Dest",
                         "defaultUrl":"/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z04_SRV/"
                      }
                   }
         },
         "data":{
              "request":{
                "url":"{{destinations.FD1}}/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z04_SRV/ZUI5_COMMONSet",
                "withCredentials": "true"
              },
              "path":"/d/results"
         },
        "designtime":"dt/configuration",
        "header": {
            "title": "Workflow History",
            "subTitle": "All type of Workflow history",
            "icon": {
                "src": "sap-icon://desktop-mobile"
            }
        },
        "content": {
            "item":{
                "title": "{EmpName}",
                "description": "{WiText}"
            },
            "maxItems" : 5
    }
},
    "sap.platform.mobilecards": {
        "compatible": true
    }
}

Thanks & Regards,

Devi

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition  SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform , @ronaldlee @Divya_Tiwari

entry.title: Destinations are working in BAS but not in Build Work Zone, advanced edition
entry.content:
Hey experts,

I am quite new to the whole SAP world. Currently I am trying to retrieve data from a destination using a SAP UI5 integration card. For this reason, I have created a destination in our BTP Cockpit following this tutorial.

After checking that everything was working fine (got 200 ok on 'Check Connection'), I created a UI integration card of type list in Business Application Studio and consumed the destination. 

 

{
    "_version": "1.14.0",
    "sap.app": {
        "id": "ns.directDeploymentTest",
        "type": "card",
        "title": "Destination test",
        "subTitle": "Test card for testing Destinations",
        "applicationVersion": {
            "version": "1.0.34"
        }
    },
    "sap.ui": {
        "technology": "UI5",
        "deviceTypes": {
            "desktop": true,
            "phone": true,
            "tablet": true
        },
        "icons": {
            "icon": "sap-icon://list"
        }
    },
    "sap.card": {
        "extension": "/dataExtension",
        "type": "List",
        "designtime": "dt/configuration",
        "configuration": {
            "parameters": {
                "cases": {
                    "value": "Adresse"
                }
            },
            "destinations": {
                "test": {
                    "name": "test"
                }
            }
        },
        "header": {
            "title": "{version}",
            "subTitle": "Version",
            "icon": {
                "src": "sap-icon://desktop-mobile"
            },
            "data": {
                "extension": {
                    "method": "headerData"
                },
                "path": "/"
            }
        },
        "content": {
            "item": {
                "title": "{{parameters.cases}}: {ShipAddress}",
                "description": "{ShipCity}, {ShipCountry}",
                "info": {
                    "value": "{= format.dateTime(${OrderDate}, {relative:true}) }"
                }
            },
            "maxItems": 5
        },
        "data": {
            "request": {
                "url": "{{destinations.test}}/v4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/Orders",
                "method": "GET"
            },
            "path": "/value"
        },
        "footer": {
            "actionsStrip": [
                {
                    "text": "Refresh",
                    "buttonType": "Emphasized",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "Submit"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                {
                    "type": "ToolbarSpacer"
                }
            ]
        }
    },
    "sap.platform.mobilecards": {
        "compatible": false
    }
}

 

Again, everything worked fine and I got a nice preview showing all the data.

When I use the card in the workzone, the problem starts. When I use the card in my workspace, I get the message "No items available". What is even more strange is the fact that the response "200 OK" is displayed in the network tab for the corresponding request. The response body is some HTML code that I can't do anything with.

 

<html>
    <head>
        <link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7"/>
        <script>
            document.cookie = "fragmentAfterLogin=" + encodeURIComponent(location.hash) + ";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None;";
            document.cookie = "locationAfterLogin=" + encodeURIComponent(location.href.split('#')[0].split(location.host)[1]) + ";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None;";
            document.cookie = "signature=bjMqGSOEnOEj9ETqBLXC%2FZgOlB4%3D;path=/;Secure;SameSite=None;";
            location = "https://our-workzone-instance/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-workzone-rt-approuter!t3664&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Four-workzone-instance%2Flogin%2Fcallback%3FauthType%3Dxsuaa&state=a1239c50-397e-4274-b4fc-7f4c35d7d402"
        </script>
    </head>
</html>

 

Can any of you please give me a clue as to what I am doing wrong? I have tried different destinations but the overall picture does not change.

 

Thanks a lot for your time and effort.

 

Christian

entry.title: Error while deploying .mtar file/mta_archives from BAS
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

I've created a custom plugin to register in SAP DM. I'm able to build the MTA project from mta.yaml file

but while trying to deploy .mtar file generated in mta_archives I'm getting below error 

Thanks in Advance!

regards,

Anvesh

entry.title: Can't manage to get data for my chart in my Object Page with annotation.xml
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm pretty new in SAP BTP development so I may not use the right terms.

My final goal is to display a chart in a object page.

My problem : The chart remains empty (I have data in backend).
My empty chart

I follow this tutorial for inspiration : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-configure-object-pages.html, but I don't understand why it is working with this example and not mine.

If I display another Facet just before with BillingStatus and NetAmount displayed by default, results is different (but still false because I have just the amount of first order for each BillingStatus and not the sum of all).
Chart fill but incorrectly

here is my data in backend, i am using GWSAMPLE_BASIC service and BusinessPartnerSet entitySet.

{
	"d": {
		"__metadata": {
			"id": "GWSAMPLE_BASIC/BusinessPartnerSet('0100000006')",
		},
		"ToSalesOrders": {
			"results": [
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000003",
					"NetAmount": "1431.97",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000004",
					"NetAmount": "639.70",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000013",
					"NetAmount": "6938.00",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000014",
					"NetAmount": "2907.00",
					"BillingStatus": "P",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Paid"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}

 DB Table SNWD_SO

Annotation.xml (to simplify reading, I've cut the content to the section that seems to correspond to my problem)

<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.BusinessPartner">
	 <Annotation Term="UI.FieldGroup" Qualifier="TechnicalData">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Label mais où ?" />
			<PropertyValue Property="Data">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BusinessPartnerID" />
					</Record>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="LegalForm" />
						<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="test Label"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Facets">
		<Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="TechData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.FieldGroup#TechnicalData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet 1" />
			</Record>
			<!-- This facet is displayed as a section -->
			<!--
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="OSID1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet Commandes 1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.LineItem#SO_ONE" />
			</Record>
			-->
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="chartByBilling" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Chart SO" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.Chart#BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.SalesOrder" >
	<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="SO_ONE">
	 <Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesOrderID" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="SID ONE" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="BillingStatus">
		<Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Revenue by billing"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="Revenue by Billing Status"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Column"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>BillingStatus</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="BillingStatus"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="Measures">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>NetAmount</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="NetAmount"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="DataPoint" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#NetAmount"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="NetAmount">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Net Amount"/>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>

I try many other ways to describe my chart.
I try with tool "Guided Development">Add a smart chart facet to an object page.
Nothing seems to works.

 

I'm pretty lost even I think it might be an silly mistake of mine.

Thanks for any help,

Best regards.

entry.title: SAP RAP Application Item node create button not visible Odata V2
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created a custom RAP application with Header/Item data with Draft functionality using OData V2 service. While Preview service from Eclipse Create button at Item level is visible. 

But when the service is deployed using BAS on Public cloud system the Create button is not visible.

Can you guide me in this on why create button is not visible once OData v2 service is deployed and How can I make the create button visible.

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How solve issue "Bas stuck in starting "
entry.content:
Hello
i try to use BAS , but since a couple of day it remain stuck on starting
link :
regione-emilia-romagna-ypc34si7.eu10cf.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html
id : ws-8pxs8
How to fix ?
Thanks in advance

entry.title: label and remove filters in CAP application
entry.content:
i have already applied labelling to fields but in the search it still shows field id and not the field label.

Also how to remove certain fields from the filter?

entry.title: No models found in db/,srv/,app/,schema,services
entry.content:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cap-simple-nodejs-service.html

I am following this tutorial.

Whenever i run the cds watch command in Terminal it is showing "No models found in db/,srv/,app/,schema,services Waiting for some to arrive....."

How do i resolve this issue ?
